sentence_reviews.text: Intermediate keys, values, or recurrent state are reused across generation steps to avoid recomputation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Transformer attention defines keys and values; the cited sources support attention computation but not necessarily implementation-level cache reuse.
sentence_reviews.notes: KV cache reuse is technically correct, but a serving/inference source would make it directly verified.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Caches, APIs & tool interfaces
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, Transformers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
